name: Metals X Limited
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$1.4878. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.4990 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.4878, stop A$1.3860, target A$1.5125. Risk/reward is 0.24:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
